inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net loss $618.2M on revenue $0.3M; R&D $493.9M and operating loss $729.3M (ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm)
inputs.normalization_note: Pre-revenue eVTOL developer; Lawrence owner-cash is deeply negative. Interest income on cash stack partially offsets operating burn but is not durable owner cash.

bear.notes: Certification delay or failure; continued dilution; payoff near impaired liquid asset value

base.notes: Partial Midnight certification and limited commercial ramp; component sum base case

sotp_build.notes: Partial Midnight certification and limited commercial ramp; component sum base case

bull.notes: FAA type certification on schedule; United/Stellantis conditional orders convert; defense revenue scales

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Midnight aircraft and manufacturing lines capitalized; economic value depends on certification success (10-K Item 1)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Midnight eVTOL in certification; Georgia high-volume facility under scale-up (10-K Item 1 Business)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 operating loss $729.3M on revenue $0.3M; Q1 2026 operating loss $254.6M (10-K, 10-Q)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: United conditional purchase up to $1.0B aircraft plus $500M option; USAF contracts (10-K Note 12)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Public NYSE issuer; no material private equity stakes at cost below fair value (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or special dividend catalyst

optionality_gate.notes: Pre-profit eVTOL; filing-locked net liquid ~$2.21/sh offers partial dhando floor; certification option drives upside

growth_explanation.mechanism: Commercial air-taxi revenue begins only after FAA type certification of Midnight; United, Stellantis, and U.S. Air Force partnerships provide conditional demand paths.

falsifiers.trigger: FAA type certification delayed more than 18 months versus current public guidance without offsetting partner relief
Combined cash and short-term investments fall below $800M while net loss run rate stays above $500M annually
falsifiers.source: 10-Q balance sheet and statements of operations

stance_proposal.override_reason: Filing-locked net liquid assets ~$2.21/sh cap downside partially, but pre-revenue burn, dilution from 624M to 767M shares, and certification binary keep moat unproven.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Three additive components map net liquid claims, Midnight certification/partner option, and dilution/burn reserve once each.

components.label: Net cash, short-term investments, and debt claims

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001824502_26_000038.htm: cash $951.1M, short-term investments $824.8M, debt $80.2M; FY2025 net loss $618.2M per ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

calculations.label: Dilution and burn reserve per share

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q; GAAP net loss reflects pre-revenue R&D burn and is not owner cash.

economic_claim.description: One diluted ACHR common share, including net liquid assets, risk-adjusted Midnight certification and partner milestone value, less dilution and burn reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Pre-revenue developer with no operating enterprise cash flow; net liquid assets, certification option, and burn reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

component_groups.label: Net cash, short-term investments, and debt claims
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash, short-term investments, and debt claims
component_groups.valuation_basis: Filing-locked cash, investments, debt, and warrant liabilities divided by diluted shares.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/high stress debt and mark haircuts on liquid assets.

component_groups.label: Midnight FAA certification and partner milestone value
component_groups.economic_claim: Midnight FAA certification and partner milestone value
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value from United, Stellantis, and USAF conditional paths.
component_groups.adjustments: Probability, timing, and remaining certification capital are inside the range.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes partial certification and limited partner conversion; bear assumes failure (0).
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year Lawrence horizon aligned with scenario yield-curve stance gate.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: FY2025 R&D $493.9M and operating loss $729.3M continue until commercial revenue scales.

component_groups.label: Future dilution and pre-revenue burn reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Future dilution and pre-revenue burn reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Negative reserve for ATM/S-3 issuance and continued pre-revenue burn.
component_groups.adjustments: Separate from net liquid claim; does not double-count cash already marked.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Net cash, short-term investments, and debt claims
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
